name: Art Bauereiss

contactInfo.office: 215 E. Lufkin Ave., Suite 300, Lufkin, TX 75901

bio: Art Bauereiss serves as the District Attorney for Angelina County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Lufkin area. He works to uphold the law and ensure justice for victims of crime throughout the county.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent offenders to the fullest extent of the law
Target drug trafficking networks in the Deep East Texas region
Advocate for victims throughout the criminal justice process
Improve efficiency in case processing and court proceedings
Strengthen partnerships with law enforcement agencies
